headline: Is It Too Late To Consider AbbVie (ABBV) After The Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether AbbVie at around US$207.94 is still offering value or starting to look stretched, the next sections will help you frame that question clearly. The stock has seen a 0.4% decline over the last 7 days and is down 8.7% over the past month and 9.3% year to date, while the 1 year return sits at 22.8% and the 3 and 5 year returns are 42.1% and 130.5% respectively. Recent headlines around AbbVie have focused on its position in large cap pharmaceuticals and ongoing...
